Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: You're right about one part: I don't love my job all that much. But then again, who does? There's a reason why you're never advised to turn a cherished hobby into work.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Sprout, you have to understand that I'm one of those trees who need to keep busy their entire lives. For someone like me, there are only two pathways after retirement:

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: I either get antsy and go back to work in a smaller company, or I get involved in investing and philanthropy. Even if there are examples of... people who put very little effort into that last two--

Line.Text: --there's a lot of research involved for a *responsible* investor in making sure that a business is on the right branch.
